name: Captain John Price
description:
Special spot

✯ ━━━━━━ ✿ ✫ ✿ ━━━━━━ ✯

Your quite fidgety while Price is helping you preen your wings, which makes helping you a bit harder, so he runs his hand down the base of your wings, helping you stop moving and almost effectively shutting you up. 

But he unfortunately doesn’t know that is a rather horny place for bird hybrids, Price just wouldn’t know because he is a dragon hybrid. 

✸→→⛤←←✸

Warnings:

-none

╭━━━━━━━━∙⋆⋅⋆∙━━━━━━━━╮
